summary: Iteration 56: Tested Team Member Applications Workflow Step 2 - HR Interview and Dept Head Interview outcome tracking. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test applications with TEST_ prefix for workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Member Applications Workflow Step 2 is fully implemented. HR Interview outcome tracking (passed/failed) and Dept Head Interview outcome tracking (selected/not_selected) are working. Move to Onboarding button appears only when both interviews pass.

hr_interview_outcome_tracking.mark_result_button_appears: PASS - 'Mark Result' button appears when HR Interview is scheduled

hr_outcome_modal.passed_button: PASS - 'Passed' button with green styling and checkmark icon
hr_outcome_modal.failed_button: PASS - 'Failed' button with red styling and X icon
hr_outcome_modal.notes_field: PASS - Notes textarea for interview feedback
hr_outcome_modal.auto_reject_warning: PASS - Warning message shown when 'Failed' is selected
hr_outcome_modal.submit_button: PASS - 'Mark as Passed' / 'Mark as Failed' button changes based on selection

hr_interview_outcome_tracking.hr_passed_indicator: PASS - Green checkmark with 'HR: Passed' text shown after marking passed
hr_interview_outcome_tracking.hr_failed_auto_reject: PASS - Application status changes to 'rejected' when HR interview marked as failed

dept_head_interview_outcome_tracking.mark_result_button_appears: PASS - 'Mark Result' button appears when Dept Head is assigned

dept_head_outcome_modal.selected_button: PASS - 'Selected' button with green styling and UserCheck icon
dept_head_outcome_modal.not_selected_button: PASS - 'Not Selected' button with red styling and UserX icon
dept_head_outcome_modal.notes_field: PASS - Notes textarea for department head feedback
dept_head_outcome_modal.auto_reject_warning: PASS - Warning message shown when 'Not Selected' is selected
dept_head_outcome_modal.submit_button: PASS - 'Mark as Selected' / 'Mark as Not Selected' button changes based on selection

dept_head_interview_outcome_tracking.dept_selected_indicator: PASS - Green checkmark with 'Dept: Selected' text shown after marking selected
dept_head_interview_outcome_tracking.dept_not_selected_auto_reject: PASS - Application status changes to 'rejected' when marked as not_selected

move_to_onboarding_logic.button_visibility: PASS - 'Move to Onboarding' button only appears when BOTH HR passed AND Dept Head selected
move_to_onboarding_logic.button_styling: PASS - Green button with ChevronRight icon
move_to_onboarding_logic.status_change: PASS - Clicking button changes status to 'onboarding'

status_indicators.hr_passed_green_checkmark: PASS - Green background with CheckCircle2 icon for passed
status_indicators.hr_failed_red_x: PASS - Red background with X icon for failed
status_indicators.dept_selected_green_checkmark: PASS - Green background with CheckCircle2 icon for selected
status_indicators.dept_not_selected_red_x: PASS - Red background with X icon for not_selected

api_endpoints.auto_status_change: PASS - Status automatically changes to 'rejected' when outcome is failed/not_selected

candidates_tab.status_indicators_visible: VERIFIED - HR: Passed and Dept: Selected indicators shown
